headline: Scott Styris: Total Pursuit Collapse
text: The dismissal of Scott Styris in the 20th over against Pakistan in 2009 triggered a massive 85% drop in win probability for New Zealand. His presence was mathematically the only viable anchor holding the run chase together. This 85-percentage-point swing perfectly highlights his absolute structural importance to the middle order.

headline: GH Worker: Elite Pressure Reversal
text: GH Worker actively dictates terms during batting collapses, surging to a 132.8 strike rate when his team loses three early wickets. text: Phoebe Litchfield completely alters her standard pacing during top-order failures, raising her strike rate to a massive 145.7 when three wickets are down.
